H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H

ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f✝ : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
⊢ ∀ (m : ℂ) (x : H),
    { toFun := fun y => ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha (m • x) y) f,
        map_add' := ⋯, map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ } =
      (starRingEnd ℂ) m •
        { toFun := fun y => ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f,
          map_add' := ⋯, map_smul' := ⋯, cont := ⋯ }

by
                        -- Use the fact that the integral of a function with respect to a complex measure is bounded by the product of the measure's norm and the function's norm
                        have h₁₁ : ‖∫ z : (spectrum ℂ a), f z ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y)‖ ≤ ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))‖ * ‖f‖ := by
                          -- Use the fact that the integral of a function with respect to a complex measure is bounded by the product of the measure's norm and the function's norm
                          calc
                            ‖∫ z : (spectrum ℂ a), f z ∂(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y)‖ = ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ := rfl
                            _ ≤ ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))‖ * ‖f‖ := by
                              -- Use the fact that the integral of a function with respect to a complex measure is bounded by the product of the measure's norm and the function's norm
                              have h₁₂ : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))‖ * ‖f‖ := by
                                -- Use the fact that the integral of a function with respect to a complex measure is bounded by the product of the measure's norm and the function's norm
                                calc
                                  ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))‖ * ‖f‖ := by
                                    -- Use the fact that the integral of a function with respect to a complex measure is bounded by the product of the measure's norm and the function's norm
                                    have h₁₃ : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))‖ * ‖f‖ := by
                                      -- Use the fact that the integral of a function with respect to a complex measure is bounded by the product of the measure's norm and the function's norm
                                      simp_all [Complex.norm_eq_abs, Complex.abs, Complex.normSq]
                                      <;>
                                      norm_num
                                      <;>
                                      linarith
                                    exact h₁₃
                                  _ = ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))‖ * ‖f‖ := by rfl
                              exact h₁₂
                        exact h₁₁
                      exact h₁₀
                    _ = ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))‖ * ‖f‖ := by rfl
                exact h₉
              exact h₈
            exact h₇
          _ = ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))‖ * ‖f‖ := by rfl
      exact h₆
    calc
      ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y : ComplexMeasure (spectrum ℂ a))‖ * ‖f‖ := h₅
      _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖f‖ := by
        gcongr
        <;>
        simp_all [ComplexMeasure.norm_eq_total_variation, ComplexMeasure.total_variation_le_iff]
        <;>
        norm_num
        <;>
        linarith
      _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by ring
  exact h₁

def toBoundedBilin {C : ℝ} (f : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)
  --(hf_bounded : ∀ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ C) (hf_measurable : @Measurable _ _ (borel (spectrum ℂ a)) _ f)
  : H →L⋆[ℂ] H →L[ℂ] ℂ where
  toFun x := {  toFun y := (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
                map_add' := by
                  intro y₁ y₂
                  simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
                  <;>
                  simp_all [ComplexLinearMap.add_apply, ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try linarith
                map_smul' := by
                  intro y c
                  simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
                  <;>
                  simp_all [ComplexLinearMap.add_apply, ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try linarith
                cont := by
                  apply LinearMap.continuous_of_bounded
                  intro y
                  have h₁ : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
                    sorry
                  sorry
              }
  map_add' := by
    intro x₁ x₂
    ext y
    simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
    <;>
    simp_all [ComplexLinearMap.add_apply, ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
    <;>
    try norm_num
    <;>
    try linarith
  map_smul' := by
    intro x c
    ext y
    simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
    <;>
    simp_all [ComplexLinearMap.add_apply, ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
    <;>
    try norm_num
    <;>
    try linarith

def toBoundedBilin {C : ℝ} (f : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)
  --(hf_bounded : ∀ x, ‖f x‖ ≤ C) (hf_measurable : @Measurable _ _ (borel (spectrum ℂ a)) _ f)
  : H →L⋆[ℂ] H →L[ℂ] ℂ where
  toFun x := {  toFun y := (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
                map_add' := by
                  intro y₁ y₂
                  simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
                  <;>
                  simp_all [ComplexLinearMap.add_apply, ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try linarith
                map_smul' := by
                  intro y c
                  simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
                  <;>
                  simp_all [ComplexLinearMap.add_apply, ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
                  <;>
                  try norm_num
                  <;>
                  try linarith
                cont := by
                  apply LinearMap.continuous_of_bounded
                  intro y
                  have h₁ : ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
                    sorry
                  sorry
              }
  map_add' := by
    intro x₁ x₂
    ext y
    simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
    <;>
    simp_all [ComplexLinearMap.add_apply, ComplexMeasure.integral_add]
    <;>
    try norm_num
    <;>
    try linarith
  map_smul' := by
    intro x c

by
    intro x r
    ext y
    simp [ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
    <;>
    congr 1 <;>
    simp [cfc_toComplexMeasure, cfc_toLinearFunctional, toLinearFunctional, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul]
    <;>
    ring_nf
    <;>
    simp_all [smul_smul]
    <;>
    aesop

by
      sorry
    , cont := by
      sorry }
    = (starRingEnd ℂ) m •
      { toFun := fun y => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
        , map_add' := by
          sorry
        , map_smul' := by
          sorry
        , cont := by
          sorry } := by
    have h3 : { toFun := fun y => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha (m • x) y).integral f
      , map_add' := by sorry
      , map_smul' := by sorry
      , cont := by sorry }
      = { toFun := fun y => conj m • (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
        , map_add' := by sorry
        , map_smul' := by sorry
        , cont := by sorry } := by
      ext y
      rw [h_main y]
      <;> simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.conj_re, Complex.conj_im]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_num
    rw [h3]
    have h4 : { toFun := fun y => conj m • (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
      , map_add' := by sorry
      , map_smul' := by sorry
      , cont := by sorry }
      = (starRingEnd ℂ) m •
        { toFun := fun y => (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
          , map_add' := by sorry
          , map_smul' := by sorry
          , cont := by sorry } := by
      ext y
      simp [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.conj_re, Complex.conj_im, starRingEnd_apply, smul_eq_mul]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.conj_re, Complex.conj_im]
      <;> norm_num
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.conj_re, Complex.conj_im]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> linarith
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.conj_re, Complex.conj_im]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> linarith
        })
    rw [h4]
    <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.conj_re, Complex.conj_im]
    <;> norm_num
  
  exact h_final
by sorry

by
    intros

    simp [smul_smul]
    <;>

    <;>

    <;>
    try simp_all [ComplexMeasure.integral_smul]
    <;>
    try norm_num

    <;>
    try ring_nf

by
